{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213018E699E4D538CB9770BD13"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601776837192713022","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在遍地“爽文”“系统流”的修仙文里，《无良药仙》像个特立独行的异类。它没有一路开挂的主角，没有金手指，更没有开后宫的俗套，却用“无良”的黑色幽默，讲了一个最接地气、最鲜活的红尘仙成长故事。姬无良这个主角，从一开始就打破了修仙文的刻板印象。他不是根骨奇佳的天选之子，也不是背负血海深仇的复仇者，只是个“柔弱不能自理”的丹药修士。他看透世态炎凉后选择以“无良”立世，却偏偏掉进了一个全员“不靠谱”的宗门","text_exts":[{"e":89,"s":86,"text":"红尘仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BA%A2%E5%B0%98%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740998199770BD13%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601776837192713022%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227408162204781907006%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BA%A2%E5%B0%98%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769930373,"group_id":"7408162204781907006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2TLS7Ia77bOYo5rp2l4VbZSOwXMH9X/+hdLCreZ06Tx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3499121434443580","user_name":"七国的何安下"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3499121434443580","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7408162204781907006","book_info":{"abstract":"注：不无脑爽无系统无后宫！！群像文，偏慢热。
吃锅的长老，偷灵鸡的师姐，上吊的师侄？
那一个发誓看破人世冷暖、再也不相信所谓良心，要以“无良”作为名字的失忆少年嘴角微微抽搐。
不是，谁家好人这样修仙啊？
节选自一位柔弱不能自理的红尘仙的成长故事。
篱箫宗的“温馨”修炼日常。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/70ab08d7c15c948a0ddaab75c5cbc2fa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"真的无良道人","author_id":"","book_id":"7408162204781907006","book_name":"无良药仙【谁家好人这样修仙？】","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596944567069327934","read_count":"8","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"152769"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"67","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/70ab08d7c15c948a0ddaab75c5cbc2fa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283819&x-signature=KFvt5lzfZi5p6dfiw2jEcX7JXTw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"539224096389635","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"18"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213018E699E4D538CB9770BD13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7403,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7421,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":43},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7408162204781907006","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominat
